text: Bapuji ke jaane ke baad property ko lekar bhaiyon mein aisi darar aayi ki baat court tak pahunch gayi hai, aur ab Mummy ne announce kiya ki Mausa-Mausi permanently hamare sath rahenge. Main ghar ka bada hone ke naate unhe mana nahi kar sakta kyunki hamare sanskar mein bado ke faisle par sawal uthana 'izzat' ke khilaf hai. Main bas 'kuch nahi hone dunga' wala mask pehen kar sab seh raha hoon taaki rishtey mitti mein na milein.

Jaydad ke jhagde ne parivaar ko do hisso mein baant diya hai aur ab in-laws ne permanently rehne ka announce kar diya hai. Mujhe apni health neglect karne ka darr hai par Papa ki aatma ki shanti aur parivaar ki unity ke liye main unhe jane ko nahi bol sakta. Main bas mann maar kar unki seva mein laga hoon taaki 'log kya kahenge' wala kalesh bazaar mein na uchle.

Sibling estrangement itni badh gayi hai ki bhai ne moneylender se hath mila liya, aur upar se in-laws ne ghar par permanently kabza kar liya hai. Mera dimaag fat raha hai par parivaar ki shanti ke liye main chup-chap unki baatein sunta hoon kyunki hamare yahan bado ke aage bolna bad-tameezi mani jati hai. Main apni takleef kisi ko nahi bata raha taaki ghar ki 'izzat' bani rahe aur Mummy ko dukh na ho.

Dadi ke marne ke baad property dispute ke beech in-laws ka permanent aana mere liye ek naya stress hai, par main hamesha defensive rehta hoon taaki rishto ka lihaz bana rahe. Main breadwinner hoon aur poore parivaar ka bojh mere kandhon par hai, isliye main unhe jane ko bolkar parivaar mein aur fracture nahi chahta. Pati aur bete hone ka farz nibhate huye main unke samman mein apni har khwahish kurban kar raha hoon.

Inheritance dispute ki wajah se pehle hi parivaar fracture ho gaya hai aur ab Mummy keh rahi hain ki in-laws ke aane se hi hamara paksh mazboot hoga. Main mentally aur physically toot chuka hoon par parivaar ki 'izzat' bachane ke liye main hamesha haan mein haan milata hoon. Main nahi chahta ki rishtedar hamari kamzori ka mazaak udayein, isliye bas 'kuch nahi hone dunga' wali zidd mein sab bardasht kar raha hoon.
